title: galium subvelutinum var. kurdicum
intro: Galium subvelutinum var. kurdicum, also known as Kurdish Bedstraw, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to the Middle East and Turkey. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and aiding in digestion. Galium subvelutinum var. kurdicum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
